message:
fix(snapshots): normalize actor fields in JSON output snapshots

Add normalization for user/actor fields (created_by, assignee, owner,
author, deleted_by, closed_by_session, actor) to prevent snapshot
test failures when running on different systems. Also extends timestamp
normalization to include deleted_at, marked_at, and exported_at fields.

This fixes the 7+ snapshot test failures caused by the recent addition
of created_by field to JSON output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
